fields.name: account_membership_id
fields.description: Durable own-account membership for the identity. Null for platform/root sessions.

fields.name: account_id
fields.description: Effective account scope. Equals impersonated account when acting-as is active.

fields.name: acting_as_account_id
fields.description: Target account when X-Acting-As-Account is active. Null for normal sessions.

fields.name: acting_as_scope
fields.description: Authority path used for the active acting-as scope. Null for normal sessions.

fields.name: account_type
fields.description: Effective commercial tier for the current account scope, or the canonical root network tier for platform sessions.

fields.name: features
fields.description: Backend-resolved account-tier features, including defaults and overrides.

fields.name: enabled_feature_keys
fields.description: Convenience list of enabled feature keys for frontend gates.

fields.name: relationship_summaries
fields.description: Informational relationship rows for badges/scoped reads. Not selectable workspaces.

fields.name: default_account_id
fields.description:
The account to use as default in entity creation forms.
For scoped users (including acting-as): same as account_id.
For unscoped root users: the platform root account ID.

fields.name: default_account_name
fields.description: Human-readable label for default_account_id when forms need a readonly owner-account display.

fields.name: managed_account_ids
fields.description: Account IDs this user's account manages via managed-by relationships.
